meta.title: SpaceX Launch Calendar
meta.description: Subscribe to an online ICS calendar and keep up with upcoming SpaceX launches.

header.copy: Subscribe to an online ICS calendar and keep up with upcoming SpaceX launches.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to Online Calendar
subscribe.copy: Use the subscription links below to add this calendar. Once deployed on a public HTTPS domain, calendar apps with ICS subscription support can keep it synced automatically.

hero.loadingDescription: Fetching the current mission queue and launch windows from SpaceX website feeds.
hero.noMissionsDescription: The live mission feed did not return any upcoming launches.
hero.unavailableDescription: The app could not reach the SpaceX mission feeds just now.

overview.noLaunchWindows: No launch windows are available yet.

calendar.title: Browse missions by month
calendar.noLaunches: No dated launches are available for this month yet.

mission.emptyState: No upcoming SpaceX missions were returned by the live data feed.
mission.launchTimingUnavailable: Launch timing has not been published yet.
